command_log.command: mkdir -p .wheel/outputs/team-test && echo 'Team static test started' > .wheel/outputs/team-test/setup.txt && echo 'Setup complete'
STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && echo "State: $(basename $STATE_FILE)" && jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"]}' "$STATE_FILE"

bash -c '
PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.849"
export WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/guard.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/engine.sh"
STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1)
WORKFLOW_FILE=$(jq -r ".workflow_file" "$STATE_FILE")
engine_init "$WORKFLOW_FILE" "$STATE_FILE"
RESULT=$(engine_handle_hook "stop" "{\"session_id\":\"f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a\",\"agent_id\":\"\"}" 2>/dev/null)
echo "Decision: $(echo "$RESULT" | jq -r .decision)"
echo "Cursor: $(jq .cursor "$STATE_FILE")"
echo "Teammates: $(jq -r "[.teams[\"create-team\"].teammates | keys[]] | join(\", \")" "$STATE_FILE")"
echo "Steps: $(jq -r "[.steps[] | \"\(.id):\(.status)\"] | join(\", \")" "$STATE_FILE")"
' 2>/dev/null
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo "$w: $(ls .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/ 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ')"; done

echo "=== Worker outputs ===" && for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo -n "$w: "; test -f ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" && echo "HAS OUTPUT" || echo "waiting..."; done && echo "" && echo "=== Sub-workflow state files ===" && for sf in .wheel/state_*.json; do [[ -f "$sf" ]] && echo "$(basename $sf): $(jq -r .workflow_name "$sf") cursor=$(jq .cursor "$sf")"; done 2>/dev/null || echo "None"
echo "Waiting for workers to activate and complete..."

echo "=== Worker outputs ===" && for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo -n "$w: "; test -f ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" && echo "DONE" || echo "waiting..."; done && echo "" && echo "=== State files ===" && for sf in .wheel/state_*.json; do [[ -f "$sf" ]] && echo "$(basename $sf): $(jq -r .workflow_name "$sf") cursor=$(jq .cursor "$sf") owner=$(jq -r .owner_agent_id "$sf")"; done 2>/dev/null
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo -n "$w: "; test -f ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" && echo "DONE" || echo "waiting"; done

for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo -n "$w: "; test -f ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" && echo "DONE" || echo "waiting"; done && echo "" && ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' && echo " state files"

for sf in .wheel/state_*.json; do [[ -f "$sf" ]] && echo "$(basename $sf): $(jq -r .workflow_name "$sf") cursor=$(jq .cursor "$sf") owner=$(jq -r .owner_agent_id "$sf") steps=$(jq -r '[.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"] | join(", ")' "$sf")"; done
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo -n "$w: "; test -f ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" && echo "DONE" || echo "working"; done
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo -n "$w: "; test -f ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" && echo "DONE" || echo "working"; done
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo -n "$w: "; test -f ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" && echo "DONE" || echo "working"; done

for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo -n "$w: "; test -f ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" && echo "DONE" || echo "working"; done && echo "" && ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' && echo " state files (3 sub + 1 main = workers still running, 1 main only = all done)"
for sf in .wheel/state_*.json; do [[ -f "$sf" ]] && echo "$(basename $sf): $(jq -r .workflow_name "$sf")"; done
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo -n "$w: "; test -f ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" && cat ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" || echo "working"; done
ls -la .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/worker-1/ && echo "---" && ls -la .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/worker-2/ && echo "---" && ls -la .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/worker-3/
ls -la .wheel/outputs/worker-result.md 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && cat .wheel/outputs/worker-result.md 2>/dev/null || echo "Not found at default path"
ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | while read sf; do echo "$(basename $sf): $(jq -r .workflow_name "$sf")"; done
ls -t .wheel/history/success/ | head -5
STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && jq '.teams["create-team"].teammates | to_entries[] | {name: .key, agent_id: .value.agent_id, status: .value.status}' "$STATE_FILE"

PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.849" && export WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && bash -c "source '${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh' && SF=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json | head -1) && state_update_teammate_status \"\$SF\" create-team worker-1 completed && state_update_teammate_status \"\$SF\" create-team worker-2 completed && state_update_teammate_status \"\$SF\" create-team worker-3 completed && echo 'Done'" 2>/dev/null
